projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with real-time inventory management.
projects.bodyHtml: Built a scalable e-commerce platform handling 10k+ daily transactions. Features include real-time inventory sync, Stripe integration, and an admin dashboard with analytics.

projects.title: Design System
projects.description: Comprehensive component library with accessibility-first approach.
projects.bodyHtml: Created a design system powering 5+ products. Includes 60+ components, full keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and automated visual regression testing.

projects.title: Real-Time Dashboard
projects.description: Analytics dashboard with live data streaming and custom visualizations.
projects.bodyHtml: Real-time analytics dashboard processing 1M+ events/day. Features custom D3 visualizations, WebSocket streaming, and sub-second latency data updates.
